name: autoresearch-survey-quality-skillset
created_for: Reusable survey quality cleaning workflows for unannotated market research exports

skills.purpose: Run auditable survey quality scoring, produce respondent-level evidence, and add Opulent-generated semantic annotations.
Compare candidate annotations to PM adjudication and propose evidence-backed rubric changes.
Create PM-facing and client-facing quality reports, publication-style Recharts dashboards, agent semantic analysis, trust rationales, and survey-improvement synthesis.
